name: Acoustic (IBM Watson Marketing) API
what_it_does: Acoustic REST and XML APIs for marketing automation, email campaign management, and customer engagement platform. Enables AI agents to manage email campaign creation, scheduling, and delivery for marketing automation, handle contact database management and list segmentation for audience targeting, access behavioral tracking and engagement analytics for customer journey optimization, retrieve A/B testing and campaign performance data for marketing optimization, manage transactional email and triggered message workflow for lifecycle marketing, handle content management and personalization data for dynamic content delivery, access web tracking and behavioral scoring for lead scoring automation, retrieve campaign analytics and attribution reporting for marketing ROI measurement, manage landing page and form data for demand generation, and integrate Acoustic campaign data with CRM and sales automation platforms.
use_cases: Automating email campaigns from B2B marketing automation agents
Managing contact segmentation from audience targeting agents
Triggering behavioral emails from lifecycle marketing agents
Analyzing campaign performance from marketing analytics agents
not_for: B2C high-volume e-commerce email without B2B enterprise focus
SMS-first marketing without email campaign primary use case
Small business without enterprise marketing automation scale
best_when: An enterprise B2B marketer using Acoustic (formerly IBM Watson Campaign Automation or Silverpop) wants AI agents to automate campaign creation, contact management, behavioral scoring, and email delivery optimization.
avoid_when: DELIVERABILITY RISK: Acoustic email deliverability depends on sender reputation and list hygiene — automated high-volume sending without suppression list management and bounce handling creates IP/domain blacklisting risk. CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance for automated email requires unsubscribe honor within 10 business days and proper consent tracking. Acoustic XML API is legacy (Silverpop heritage); REST API coverage is incomplete for some campaign management functions.

auth.notes: Acoustic uses OAuth 2.0. API credentials via developer portal at developer.goacoustic.com. Webhooks for campaign events. REST and XML APIs. Chicago, Illinois HQ. IBM spun out Watson Marketing as Acoustic (2019), backed by Centerbridge Partners PE. Formerly IBM Watson Campaign Automation (IWCA), formerly Silverpop (acquired by IBM 2014). 3,500+ enterprise customers globally. Competes with Oracle Responsys, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, and Adobe Campaign for enterprise B2B marketing automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by email volume and contacts
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Acoustic founded 2019 (IBM spinout). Centerbridge Partners PE-backed. Formerly IBM Watson Campaign Automation / Silverpop. 3,500+ customers. B2B marketing automation focus. Competes with Marketo (Adobe), Eloqua (Oracle), and Pardot (Salesforce) for B2B marketing automation and Oracle Responsys for B2C.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; volume-based throttling

known_agent_gotchas: DELIVERABILITY RISK: Automated high-volume email without bounce/complaint management creates sender reputation damage; implement suppression list checks before bulk sends
Legacy XML API coexistence — Acoustic has both REST and XML (Silverpop heritage) APIs; some features only available via XML; REST API coverage is incomplete for advanced campaign management
IBM heritage complexity — documentation and product naming still reflects IBM Watson branding in places; developer.goacoustic.com is the canonical developer portal
PE ownership instability — Centerbridge Partners PE ownership creates product roadmap uncertainty; verify product direction for long-term integration decisions
GDPR consent tracking — European contact automation requires consent basis documentation; automated contact creation without proper GDPR consent creates data protection violations
Campaign send timing — bulk email sends are rate-limited and queue-based; automated campaigns have send delay that must be accounted for in time-sensitive workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Marketing automation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Contact and email engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marketing automation. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Contact and campaign data.
